title: Encrypted message detail retrieval with authorized access messaging and Sender/Receiver labels

requirements.summary: Load message details by id from the backend single-message fetch capability and show clear unauthorized/not-found UI states.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to a message detail route fetches the message by id from the backend rather than relying solely on the full inbox list already in cache.
If the backend indicates unauthorized access, the UI shows an English error message explaining the viewer is not an authorized participant for that message.
If the backend indicates not found, the UI shows an English 'Message not found' style error state and provides a way to return to the inbox.

file_operations.description: Add a React Query hook (e.g., useGetMessageById) that calls the backend actor's getMessageById and exposes loading/error states. Use this to ensure the message detail view can fetch independently of the inbox list. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing (authorization component guidance for handling trap-based authorization errors in the UI).

Refactor to fetch the message via the new single-message hook using the route param id (BigInt conversion as needed) instead of searching the cached inbox list. Add explicit UI handling for backend errors: show an English unauthorized message when the backend rejects access, show an English not-found message when the id is missing, and include a clear 'Back to Inbox' action in both cases. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing (authorization component guidance: gracefully handle Runtime.trap authorization failures).

requirements.summary: Rename participant labels in message details to 'Sender' and 'Receiver' and display their Principal (or profile name) values accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: In the message detail UI, the participant fields are labeled 'Sender' and 'Receiver' (English) while displaying the corresponding Principal values (or profile names if available).

file_operations.description: Update the message participant section to use 'Sender' and 'Receiver' labels (replacing 'From'/'To') while continuing to display the resolved profile name when available, otherwise the Principal string. Ensure the values map to message.from (Sender) and message.to (Receiver) consistently for both sent and received messages. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
